title: Moralis API keys should not be disclosed
description: Moralis is a Web3 development platform providing blockchain APIs for NFTs, tokens, DeFi, and authentication. API keys authenticate all Moralis API calls. Exposing keys allows unauthorized blockchain data queries at your expense.
recommendation: Remove Moralis API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at admin.moralis.io.
impact: Unauthorized blockchain data queries at your expense including NFT data, token prices, DeFi analytics, and wallet information.

checks.message: Moralis Web3 API key detected in variable assignment. Moralis API keys authenticate blockchain data requests including NFT metadata and ownership data, token prices and DeFi analytics, wallet transaction history, smart contract event data, and Web3 authentication. Exposing this key enables unauthorized queries billed to your account. Rotate immediately at admin.moralis.io.
